status_update: Scaffolded this standalone follow-up to type the open-sandbox helper clusters left under file-wide `@ts-nocheck` after 04-20-skill-test-sandbox-type-hardening.

Extracted typed open-sandbox helper logic into server/domain/skill-test/open-sandbox-typed-helpers.ts, rewired open-sandbox-factory.ts to consume the typed tool-adapter/support builders, and tightened the compat startRun contract in sandbox-tool-contract.ts without changing the default host-loop + sandbox-tools execution path.
